description: The team investigating a CAPA needs more time for their root cause analysis. A manager needs to approve an extension.

nodes.task_description: Locate the CAPA request that needs an extension.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the open CAPA in the system.

nodes.task_description: Review the reason provided for the extension request.

expected_outcome.value: Manager reviews the notes about needing to perform additional testing.

nodes.task_description: Approve the extension and set a new due date for the investigation phase.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the CAPA with the new due date and logs the approval.
